Table of Contents

Interface IServerObjectAdmin6

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Server
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Server.dll

Provides access to members that administer the ArcGIS server.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("DC0E02CD-E386-4324-B31F-56B2C5D22363")]
public interface IServerObjectAdmin6 : IServerObjectAdmin5, IServerObjectAdmin4, IServerObjectAdmin3, IServerObjectAdmin2, IServerObjectAdmin
